message:
🌱 Consolidate color palette: merge indigo→blue and pink→purple (10→8 colors) (#1906)

Reduce the design system color palette from 10 to 8 by consolidating
indigo→blue and pink→purple. Updates CSS classes, TypeScript type
definitions, AI prompt color lists, stat block definitions, and color
lookup maps across 38 files.

Final palette: red, green, blue, yellow, purple, orange, cyan, gray.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
